item.title: NO LIMITS GAMERS EDITION [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: NO LIMITS GAMERS EDITION [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: mutasim735
item.itunes:summary:
NO LIMITS GAMERS EDITION
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
This Magisk module is designed to enhance the performance of your device specifically for gaming enthusiasts. It dynamically tweaks various CPU and GPU settings to ensure optimal performance while playing games, providing a smooth and immersive gaming experience.
By fine-tuning essential system settings, this module aims to unlock the true potential of your device, allowing you to fully enjoy resource-intensive games without any performance limitations. Please note that the module requires Magisk Root to be installed on your device.

Disclaimer:
The developer is not responsible for any potential device instability or damage caused by the use of this module. Proceed at your own risk.

[Important Note]:
Reboot your device after installing this module to ensure the settings take effect properly.

Enjoy a superior gaming performance with the High Performance Gaming Boost module!
[read more]

Enjoy a superior gaming performance with the High Performance Gaming Boost module!
[read more]

This Magisk module is designed to enhance the performance of your device specifically for gaming enthusiasts. It dynamically tweaks various CPU and GPU settings to ensure optimal performance while playing games, providing a smooth and immersive gaming experience.
By fine-tuning essential system settings, this module aims to unlock the true potential of your device, allowing you to fully enjoy resource-intensive games without any performance limitations. Please note that the module requires Magisk Root to be installed on your device.

[Important Note]:

Enjoy a superior gaming performance with the High Performance Gaming Boost module!

item.title: Cigati vCard Duplicate Remover [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Cigati vCard Duplicate Remover [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: aryan62
item.itunes:summary:
Cigati vCard Duplicate Remover
(Utilities)
The Best vCard Duplicate Remover Program is a powerful tool designed to help you efficiently eliminate duplicate contacts from your address book files, specifically VCF files. This software operates hassle freely, ensuring the safety of your data throughout the entire process. Once it completes the removal of duplicates, you'll be left with pristine vCard files devoid of any duplicate contacts. One of the standout features of the vCard Duplicate Remover is its user-friendly interface, offering two convenient methods for adding multiple VCF files simultaneously: the "Add File" and "Add Folder" options. With the "Add File" option, you can easily upload a single VCF file containing as many contacts as needed. Meanwhile, the "Add Folder" option allows you to smoothly upload several VCF files of varying sizes simultaneously. What sets this vCard Duplicate Contacts Remover apart is its ability to safely eliminate duplicate contacts from your targeted vCard files without altering or deleting any original data. It meticulously preserves all metadata and maintains the file and folder structure of the newly created data file. This comprehensive software is highly compatible. In short, it works seamlessly with all versions of vCard files, including 2.1, 3.0, and the latest 4.0. It means you can confidently use any type of vCard file with this tool. When you import your vCard file into the utility, it effortlessly scans for duplicate contacts and removes them without any hiccups. Regardless of your vCard version, this wizard will handle it with ease. Upon successful removal of duplicate contacts from your selected vCard file, the software generates a comprehensive log report. This report includes crucial details such as file paths, the number of duplicates detected and removed, and a complete overview of the deletion process's status.

[read more]

Cigati vCard Duplicate Remover
(Utilities)
The Best vCard Duplicate Remover Program is a powerful tool designed to help you efficiently eliminate duplicate contacts from your address book files, specifically VCF files. One of the standout features of the vCard Duplicate Remover is its user-friendly interface, offering two convenient methods for adding multiple VCF files simultaneously: the "Add File" and "Add Folder" options. With the "Add File" option, you can easily upload a single VCF file containing as many contacts as needed. In short, it works seamlessly with all versions of vCard files, including 2.1, 3.0, and the latest 4.0. It means you can confidently use any type of vCard file with this tool. This report includes crucial details such as file paths, the number of duplicates detected and removed, and a complete overview of the deletion process's status.

[read more]

Cigati vCard Duplicate Remover
(Utilities)
The Best vCard Duplicate Remover Program is a powerful tool designed to help you efficiently eliminate duplicate contacts from your address book files, specifically VCF files. This software operates hassle freely, ensuring the safety of your data throughout the entire process. Once it completes the removal of duplicates, you'll be left with pristine vCard files devoid of any duplicate contacts. One of the standout features of the vCard Duplicate Remover is its user-friendly interface, offering two convenient methods for adding multiple VCF files simultaneously: the "Add File" and "Add Folder" options. With the "Add File" option, you can easily upload a single VCF file containing as many contacts as needed. Meanwhile, the "Add Folder" option allows you to smoothly upload several VCF files of varying sizes simultaneously. What sets this vCard Duplicate Contacts Remover apart is its ability to safely eliminate duplicate contacts from your targeted vCard files without altering or deleting any original data. It meticulously preserves all metadata and maintains the file and folder structure of the newly created data file. This comprehensive software is highly compatible. In short, it works seamlessly with all versions of vCard files, including 2.1, 3.0, and the latest 4.0. It means you can confidently use any type of vCard file with this tool. When you import your vCard file into the utility, it effortlessly scans for duplicate contacts and removes them without any hiccups. item.title: Barcode Label Maker Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Barcode Label Maker Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Barcode Label Maker Software
(Office Apps)
Wants to download Barcode Maker application? Visit company website address www.barcodelabelmaker.net is able to build wonderful barcode label and saves them in variety of graphics format on your computer which takes very few minutes. Standard barcode label creator software draw barcode label in 2D and linear font and provide option to make barcode picture list using list generating facility within few mouse of clicks.

item.title: Memory Card Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Recovery Program
(Utilities)
No need of technical guidance to operate Memory Card Recovery Program for retrieving deleted data items like songs, music file, pictures, snaps, text files, documents, video clips etc from virus contained Micro SD card. User friendly file restoration application is able to revive damaged data saved in different file extensions like doc, txt, png, jpg etc within short amount of time and money. Best data rescue utility supports multiple searching techniques like deep search, advance search, photo search, video search etc to revive crashed files and folders.

[read more]
